title: Status Summary for Specific Group
excerpt: Is there a way to summarize the statuses of a group of items in another column? I am building a high level project board and I would like to reflect the status of just our project milestone group not the entire status co…

posts.author: nsheetz86 (Nick Sheetz)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there a way to summarize the statuses of a group of items in another column? I am building a high level project board and I would like to reflect the status of just our project milestone group not the entire status column.

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey @nsheetz86! Just hopping in here to see if you were able to find a good solution for this! If not, shoot us a message at support@monday.com and we’d be happy to assist further with this!
